data.content: Fixed bash_profile-only wiring gap: fix_completions() now picks ~/.bash_profile when ~/.bashrc is absent, matching check_bash_completions() detection logic. Added 2 tests covering bash_profile-only check and fix paths. All 31 unit + 30 integration tests pass. PR: https://github.com/acartine/loom/pull/3 Branch: fix/doctor-bash-profile-wiring
